sect2.title: Introduction to Dolphin
sect2.para: The Dolphin package (not to be confused with the KF6 dolphin file manager) provides a GCN and Wii emulator.
CMake, FFmpeg, libevdev, &opengl;, Qt-6, SDL2, and Xorg Libraries
alsa-utils, BlueZ, cURL, , fmt, , libusb, libxkbcommon, libxml2, LLVM, &logind;, , , PulseAudio, Speex, and Vulkan-Loader

sect2.title: Downloading Dolphin
sect2.para: Create a list of the needed tarballs that will be downloaded:

screen.userinput:
cat > dolphin-list << "EOF" dolphin-emu/dolphin/archive/&dolphin-version;/dolphin-&dolphin-version;.tar.gz dolphin-emu/ext-win-qt/archive/&dolphin-qt-external;.tar.gz SFML/SFML/archive/&dolphin-sfml-external;.tar.gz GPUOpen-LibrariesAndSDKs/VulkanMemoryAllocator/archive/&dolphin-vk-mem-alloc-external;.tar.gz mozilla/cubeb/archive/&dolphin-cubeb-external;.tar.gz arsenm/sanitizers-cmake/archive/&dolphin-sanitize-external;.tar.gz libusb/hidapi/archive/&dolphin-hidapi-external;.tar.gz epezent/implot/archive/&dolphin-implot-external;.tar.gz mgba-emu/mgba/archive/&dolphin-mgba-external;.tar.gz zlib-ng/minizip-ng/archive/&dolphin-minizip-ng-external;.tar.gz RetroAchievements/rcheevos/archive/&dolphin-rcheevos-external;.tar.gz KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross/archive/&dolphin-spirv-cross-external;.tar.gz syoyo/tinygltf/archive/&dolphin-tinygltf-external;.tar.gz Cyan4973/xxHash/archive/&dolphin-xxhash-external;.tar.gz zlib-ng/zlib-ng/archive/&dolphin-zlib-ng-external;.tar.gz
# Required if you have not installed some recommended dependencies lsalzman/enet/archive/&dolphin-enet-external;.tar.gz fmtlib/fmt/archive/&dolphin-fmt-external;.tar.gz randy408/libspng/archive/&dolphin-libspng-external;.tar.gz libusb/libusb/archive/&dolphin-libusb-external;.tar.gz EOF

sect2.para: Now download the package and its submodules using Wget:

screen.userinput: mkdir dolphin-emu && cd dolphin-emu && grep -v '^#' ../dolphin-list | wget -i- -c \ -B &dolphin-dl-root;

sect2.title: Installation of Dolphin

screen.userinput: for i in *.tar.?z*; do echo "Extracting $i..." tar -xf $i done

sect2.para: Now that everything has been extracted, the required extracted submodules need to be moved into dolphin-&dolphin-version;. Do that by running the following commands:

screen.userinput: mv -T ext-win-qt-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/Qt && mv -T SFML-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/SFML/SFML && mv -T VulkanMemoryAllocator-* \ dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/VulkanMemoryAllocator && mv -T cubeb-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/cubeb/cubeb && mv -T sanitizers-cmake-* \ dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/cubeb/cubeb/cmake/sanitizers-cmake && mv -T hidapi-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/hidapi/hidapi-src && mv -T implot-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/implot/implot && mv -T mgba-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/mGBA/mgba && mv -T minizip-ng-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/minizip-ng/minizip-ng && mv -T rcheevos-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/rcheevos/rcheevos && mv -T SPIRV-Cross-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/spirv_cross/SPIRV-Cross && mv -T tinygltf-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/tinygltf/tinygltf && mv -T xxHash-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/xxhash/xxHash && mv -T zlib-ng-* dolphin-&dolphin-version;/Externals/zlib-ng/zlib-ng

sect2.para: If you have not installed , move the submodule into dolphin-&dolphin-version;:
If you have not installed fmt, move the submodule into dolphin-&dolphin-version;:
If you have not installed , move the submodule into dolphin-&dolphin-version;:
If you have not installed libusb, move the submodule into dolphin-&dolphin-version;:
Now go into the dolphin-&dolphin-version; directory:
Apply a patch to force XCB to be used in Dolphin on Wayland to avoid being unable to initialize graphics when launching a game:
Install Dolphin by running the following commands:

screen.userinput:
mkdir build && cd build &&
cmake -D CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr \ -D CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \ -D CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH=ON \ -D ENABLE_TESTS=OFF \ -D USE_SYSTEM_LIBMGBA=OFF \ -G Ninja .. &&
ninja

sect2.title: Command Explanations
sect2.para: -D ENABLE_TESTS=OFF: This parameter disables building unit tests.

-D USE_SYSTEM_LIBMGBA=OFF: This parameter forces the build system to build the vendored copy of mGBA; otherwise, there will be compilation errors if is installed due to different versions (compiling an older mGBA results in compilation errors because of it requiring an older FFmpeg version).

listitem.para: is the GUI version of Dolphin
is the command-line version of Dolphin
has multiple functions such as managing disc images
